---
title: "project"
author(s): Jezel V., John E., Shelby T.
output: ioslides_presentation
date: "2026-04-08"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE)
```

## 

```{r, echo=FALSE, out.width="70%", fig.align="center"}
knitr::include_graphics("https://logos-world.net/wp-content/uploads/2021/09/One-Piece-Logo-1999.png")
```


## Loading Data
One Piece has a lot of data that we can work with, but it also has a lot of data that we have to tidy ):


```{r}
library(jsonlite)
library(tidyverse)

## Character(s) Data 
url1 <- "https://api.api-onepiece.com/v2/characters/en"
characters <- fromJSON(url1)
characters_df <- as.data.frame(characters)


## Locations Data
url2 <- "https://api.api-onepiece.com/v2/locates/en"
locations <- fromJSON(url2)
locations_df <- as.data.frame(locations)


## Episodes Data 
url3 <- "https://api.api-onepiece.com/v2/episodes/en"
episodes <- fromJSON(url3)
episodes_df <- as.data.frame(episodes)


```

## Data Description

This specific dataframe (characters) has most (if not all) the characters from the famous Manga/Anime series "One Piece". It includes the characters name (ofc) along with their age, size, bounty (in berries), as well what crew the characters are a part of, & even if they have a devil fruit (as well as what kind with a description). The dataset is extremely detailed and I am excited to work on it!

## Bounty

In One Piece, the more chaos you cause, the higher the bounty on your head is. The bounties reflect how dangerous each pirate is. 


## Talk about tidying the data





Which character has the lowest bounty in the series?
```{r}

```


What is the average bounty between all pirates?
```{r}

```


Which "Blue" region produces pirates with higher average bounties?
```{r}
# can also be a ggplot 
```


Which crew has the highest bounty in total?
```{r}

```


What is the distribution of bounties? (high or low)
```{r}

```


Do the captains have a higher bounty than the fighters?

```{r}

```

What percentage of characters are deceased?
```{r}

```



## Devil Fruits

How many pirates from each crew has a devil fruit?

How many characters/what percentage have a devil fruit? 

Does having a devil fruit correlate to having a higher bounty?

How many different types of fruits are there? 
For each fruit, how many pirates contain one of the fruits? 

What kind of devil fruit is the most common?

Does the kind of devil fruit correlate with positions on the crew or bounty?

## Islands

How many islands are in East Blue compared to the North Blue?

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)

blue_counts <- locations_df %>%
  filter(sea_name %in% c("East Blue", "North Blue")) %>%
  count(sea_name)


ggplot(blue_counts, aes(x = sea_name, y = n)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") +
  labs(
    title = "Number of Islands: East Blue vs North Blue",
    x = "Sea",
    y = "Number of Islands"
  )
```

## Characters

ggplot

How many memebers are in Strawhats

```{r}

```

How many characters are captains of thier crew? 

How many captains are there compared to naviagtors? 








## Episodes
```{r}
glimpse(episodes_df)
```
How many episodes were released per decade?

What year had the most episode release?

What month has the most episode releases?

What is the average amount of chapters per episode?
